location: Starting weapon of the Astrologer class; also purchasable for 600 runes from the Nomadic Merchant sitting at a campfire east of Saintsbridge, North Limgrave, and droppable from Highwaymen (notably in Murkwater Cave).

source.name: Nomadic Merchant (North Limgrave, east of Saintsbridge)

tactics: Start as the Astrologer class to have it equipped from the beginning.
Otherwise buy it from the merchant camped east across the bridge from the Saintsbridge Site of Grace for 600 runes.
Alternatively farm Highwaymen in Murkwater Cave, who wield it with a modest drop chance.
lore: A humble straight sword with a short blade — light and simple to wield, trading raw power for handy piercing thrusts that make it an easy pick for less battle-hardened Tarnished.

builds.name: Beginner Int/Dex placeholder
builds.why: D/D Strength-Dexterity scaling, low weight, and Astrologer's high starting Intelligence/Mind make it a fine placeholder weapon while leveling into a caster build.
